action: Click on the Photoshop icon (Adobe Photoshop) on the taskbar or in the Start menu to open the Photoshop application. If not visible, open the Start menu by clicking the Windows icon at the bottom left of the screen, type 'Photoshop' in the search bar, and select Adobe Photoshop from the search results.
fallback_action: Perform a Google search using Internet Explorer

recipe.steps: is the first action. The task is to open Adobe Photoshop by clicking its icon on the taskbar or in the Start menu. If not visible, I should open the Start menu and search for Photoshop. On the current screen, I see an icon labeled 'Adobe Photoshop Elements' (Box ID 812) and another labeled 'Adobe Photoshop' (Box ID 95, 153, 220, 256, 548, etc. in text, but not as an icon). The most likely candidate for the Photoshop application icon is Box ID 812, which visually matches the description.
